selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 狼, 残忍贪婪之人, 极度穷困；vt. 狼吞虎咽, 大吃
words.definition: n. any of various predatory carnivorous canine mammals of North America and Eurasia that usually hunt in packs

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 预备好的状态, 现款；a. 准备好的, 备用的, 可以使用的
words.definition: n. poised for action

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 展览会, 市集, 美好的事物；a. 公平的, 按规则进行的, 不好不坏的, 晴朗的, 美丽的
words.definition: n. gathering of producers to promote business

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: a. pleasant or pleasing or agreeable in nature or appearance

words.translation: n. 下巴, 颏
words.definition: n. the protruding part of the lower jaw

words.translation: v. 建立, 建筑；n. 构造, 体格
words.definition: v. build or establish something abstract

words.translation: n. 吹, 打击, 殴打, 花开；v. 吹, 风吹, 吹响, 开花
words.definition: n. a powerful stroke with the fist or a weapon

words.translation: n. 头发, 毛发, 些微
words.definition: n. a covering for the body (or parts of it) consisting of a dense growth of threadlike structures (as on the human head); helps to prevent heat loss

words.translation: n. 家, 避难所, 故乡；a. 家庭的, 国内的, 打中目标的
words.definition: n. where you live at a particular time

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: r. used in polite request

words.translation: adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: n. 盖子, 封面, 藉口；vt. 覆盖, 掩饰, 保护, 掩护, 包括
words.definition: n. the act of concealing the existence of something by obstructing the view of it

words.translation: n. 全部, 完整；a. 充满的, 完全的, 丰富的, 完美的, 丰满的, 详尽的
n. 早晨, 早上, 初期
words.definition: n. the time period between dawn and noon

words.translation: n. 秒, 瞬间, 第二名, 支持者, 助手；a. 第二的, 其次的, 次要的, 附加的, 辅助的
words.definition: n. 1/60 of a minute; the basic unit of time adopted under the Systeme International d'Unites

words.translation: adv. 一起, 共同, 彼此
words.definition: r. in contact with each other or in proximity

words.translation: n. 小山, 丘陵, 小土堆；vt. 作成土堆, 堆成小丘
words.definition: n. a local and well-defined elevation of the land

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 领域, 田地, 场地, 战场, 场, 域；vt. 使...晒在场上, 使上场
words.definition: n. a piece of land cleared of trees and usually enclosed

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树
words.definition: n. a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 代价, 价值, 费用；vi. 花费
words.definition: n. the total spent for goods or services including money and time and labor

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: n. 充足, 够, 很多；a. 充足的, 足够
words.definition: n. an adequate quantity; a quantity that is large enough to achieve a purpose

words.translation: a. 远的, 久远的, 遥远的；adv. 甚远地, 很, 到很深的程度, 到很远的距离
words.definition: a. located at a great distance in time or space or degree

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 过去, 昔时, 往事, 早年经历, 过去时；a. 过去的, 结束的, 卸任的, 过去时的
words.definition: n. the time that has elapsed

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 水, 雨水, 海水, 水位, 水面, 流水；vt. 给...浇水, 供以水, 注入水, 使湿
words.definition: n. binary compound that occurs at room temperature as a clear colorless odorless tasteless liquid; freezes into ice below 0 degrees centigrade and boils above 1

words.translation: n. 盆, 罐, 壶, 坩埚, 奖杯；vt. 装入盆中, 在锅中煮, 随手射击
words.definition: n. metal or earthenware cooking vessel that is usually round and deep; often has a handle and lid

words.translation: a. 生气的, 愤怒的
words.definition: a. feeling or showing anger

words.translation: n. 奶油, 黄油；vt. 涂黄油于
words.definition: n. an edible emulsion of fat globules made by churning milk or cream; for cooking and table use

words.translation: num. 五, 五个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of four and one

words.translation: num. 六, 六个
words.definition: n. the cardinal number that is the sum of five and one

words.translation: n. 午后, 下午
words.definition: n. the part of the day between noon and evening

words.translation: pron. 任何人
words.definition: n. One taken at random rather than by selection; anybody.

words.translation: n. 四月
words.definition: n. the month following March and preceding May

words.translation: n. 副本, 摹仿, 一册；v. 复印, 抄袭, 复制
words.definition: n. a thing made to be similar or identical to another thing

words.translation: n. 日期, 约会, 枣椰树；vt. 约会, 定日期
words.definition: n. the specified day of the month

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: n. 内部, 内脏, 内幕；a. 内部的, 秘密的, 户内的
words.definition: n. the region that is inside of something

words.translation: n. 语言, 文字, 措辞
words.definition: n. a systematic means of communicating by the use of sounds or conventional symbols

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: vt. 推想, 假设, 以为, 想像, 假定；vi. 料想
words.definition: v. express a supposition

words.translation: vt. 投, 掷, 抛, 发射, 摔下, 匆匆穿上(或脱下), 抛弃, 摆脱；vi. 丢, 掷, 抛
prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: a. 平常的, 通常的
words.definition: a. occurring or encountered or experienced or observed frequently or in accordance with regular practice or procedure

words.translation: n. 释放, 发泄, 豁免, 发行, 释放证书；vt. 释放, 解除, 放松, 豁免, 免除, 发布, 放弃, 让与
words.definition: n. merchandise issued for sale or public showing (especially a record or film)

words.translation: vt. 寻求, 寻找, 探索, 追求, 搜索, 请求；vi. 寻找, 搜索

words.translation: n. 圆, 圆形物, 巡回, 循环, 一轮, 一回合, 一局, 范围, 轮唱；a. 圆的, 球形的, 丰满的, 肥胖的, 完全的, 大概的, 完美的, 圆润的

words.translation: a. 受惊吓的, 受惊的, (非正式)害怕...的
words.definition: s. made afraid

words.translation: n. 网, 网状物, 罗网, 净利, 净价；a. 净的, 最终的

words.translation: a. 不知道的, 未知的, 陌生的；n. 未知物, 未知数
words.definition: a. not known

words.translation: adv. 无论何处
words.definition: r. at or in or to any place; (`anyplace' is used informally for `anywhere')

words.translation: n. 苹果, 家伙
words.definition: n. fruit with red or yellow or green skin and sweet to tart crisp whitish flesh

words.translation: v. 攀登, 上升, 爬；n. 攀登, 爬升

words.translation: n. 兽皮, 迹象, 躲藏处；vt. 藏, 隐瞒, 遮避, 剥...的皮, 隐藏

words.translation: a. 可爱的, 有趣的
words.definition: s. appealing to the emotions as well as the eye

words.translation: n. 精选, 选择, 掘, 精华, 牙签, 鹤嘴锄；v. 摘, 掘, 凿, 挖, 挑选

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整

words.translation: n. 文本, 正文, 课文, 主题, 圣经文句, 乐谱

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人

words.definition: n. the inherent complex of attributes that determines a persons moral and ethical actions and reactions

words.translation: vt. 建立, 创立, 铸造；find的过去式和过去分词
adv. 的确, 实在, 真正地, 甚至
words.definition: r. in truth (often tends to intensify)

words.translation: a. 最初的, 原始的, 有创意的；n. 原物, 原作

words.translation: a. 准备好的, 特制的

words.translation: n. 卷, 滚动, 名单, 案卷, 压路机；vi. 滚, 滚动, 飘流, 起伏, 卷, 绕

words.translation: n. 头衔, 名称, 标题, 书名, 扉页, 权利, 资格, 冠军, 字幕；vt. 授予头衔, 加标题于

words.translation: n. 火, 炉火, 电炉, 火灾, 闪光体, 炮火, 热情；vt. 点燃, 烧制, 使发光, 激动, 放枪, 解雇

words.translation: n. 财富, 运气, 兴隆, 大量财产, 好运, 命运

words.translation: n. 负荷, 担子, 重担, 装载量, 负载, 工作量, 加载；vt. 装载, 装填, 使担负

words.translation: adv. 不知何故
words.definition: r. in some unspecified way or manner; or by some unspecified means

words.translation: num. 第三, 三分之一；[机] 第三; 第三的

words.translation: n. 制服；a. 统一的, 一律的, 始终如一的

words.translation: n. 去, 离去, 工作情况, 地面状况, 行为；a. 进行中的, 流行的, 成功的, 现存的

words.translation: n. ...点钟, 钟头

words.translation: n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势

words.translation: build的过去式和过去分词

words.translation: a. 离去的, 死去的, 用完的；go的过去分词

words.translation: n. 晚餐

words.translation: n. 立即, 瞬间；a. 紧急的, 立即的, 即时的
a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 欧洲
words.definition: n. the 2nd smallest continent (actually a vast peninsula of Eurasia); the British use `Europe' to refer to all of the continent except the British Isles

words.translation: n. 条件, 条款, 费用, 价钱, 关系, 地位, 交谊
